summary: `watch remove <listing-url-or-id>` deletes a watchlist entry, backed by store.DeleteWatchlistItem(listingURL) which DELETEs by the UNIQUE listing_url under writeMu and returns rows-affected. A full URL matches verbatim; a bare id is resolved to its stored URL by scanning the watchlist. Removing an absent listing is a not-found (exit 3), not a silent success.
reason: The watchlist had add/list/check but no removal path, so a watched listing could only be taken off by hand-editing the DB. The delete keys on listing_url (the UNIQUE column) to hit exactly one row; id-resolution exists because the bare room id is what `watch list` surfaces. A regen must keep DeleteWatchlistItem on the hand-written store/rental.go (next to the other watchlist mutators, under writeMu), not on generated store.go.
validated_outcome: go build/vet green; store test seeds one watchlist row, DeleteWatchlistItem returns 1 and COUNT drops to 0, second delete returns 0 with no error.
